assertion_results.text: Step 7 executes the concurrent triage check for upstream component quinn-proto
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md explicitly titles itself 'Step 7 -- Concurrent Triage Detection', confirms the upstream affected component field (customfield_10632) is set to 'quinn-proto', declares Step 7 applicable, and shows the JQL query filtering on cf[10632] ~ 'quinn-proto'.

assertion_results.text: No concurrent triages are detected — the JQL search returns zero results
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md line 26: 'The JQL query returned **zero results**. No other engineer is currently triaging a different CVE that affects the same upstream component (`quinn-proto`).' Corroborated in triage-outcome.md line 9: 'The JQL search returned zero results.'

assertion_results.text: The analysis proceeds directly to Case A/B/C branching without a concurrent triage warning
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md lines 30-32 state: 'proceed silently to Case A/B/C branching' and 'No concurrent triage warning is presented. Triage continues directly to the Case A/B/C remediation decision in Step 8.' triage-outcome.md then proceeds directly to 'Triage Decision: Case A + Case B' with no warning interposed.

assertion_results.text: The output does not present wait/skip/proceed options since no conflict exists
assertion_results.evidence: concurrent-triage.md line 32: 'No wait/skip/proceed options are offered to the user.' triage-outcome.md line 9: 'without presenting any warning or options to the user.' No wait, skip, or proceed options appear anywhere in any output file.
